subcodes.first_line: The epistle of your honor hath been perused, and the spiritual melodies from the mystic Nightingale were heard, and the people's aversion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب آنجناب ملاحظه شد و نغمات روحانی از عندلیب معنوی مسموع گشت و اعراض مردم
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
